  • FEATURES:



























  • BATTERY AND POWER



























  • Battery life of 3+ days. Battery life and charge cycles vary with use, settings, and other factors; actual results will vary. Use of the always-on display feature will require more frequent charging. We recommend charging every few days to ensure you’re always tracking.



























  • Battery type: Lithium-polymer



























  • Charge time (0-100%): Two hours



























  • Radio transceiver: Bluetooth 4.0



























  • MEMORY



























  • Saves 7 days of detailed motion data – minute by minute



























  • Saves daily totals for the last 30 days



























  • Stores heart rate data at one-second intervals during exercise tracking and at five-second intervals all other times



























  • CARE



























  • Give your wrist a rest by taking the band off every now and then. If the band gets wet or you sweat in it, remove and completely dry the band before putting it back on. Learn more.



























  • MATERIALS



























  • This watch includes a band made of a flexible, durable material similar to that used in many sports watches, as well as an aluminium watch case and buckle. The woven band is made from a comfortable polyester and includes an aluminium watch case and buckle.



























  • HEART RATE



























  • Like all heart rate tracking technologies, accuracy is affected by physiology, location of device and different movements. Learn more about wearing during workouts.

Stay Healthy: - Track heart rate, blood pressure, oxygen levels, and sleep. - Monitor your menstrual cycle for women's health. - Continuous 24-hour heart rate monitoring with alerts for abnormal spikes. - Blood-oxygen saturation measurement for insights into your health. 2. Smart Reminders: - Alerts for inactivity, calls, and messages from apps like Facebook, Twitter, Line, Skype, WhatsApp, SMS, WeChat, and QQ. 3. Call Functionality: - Control ringtones, play music, access frequently used contacts. - Loudspeaker for clear audio. - Voice dialing, call initiation, emergency SOS calls, and call management (answer/reject). 4. Exercise Tracking: - Count steps, record exercise duration, track running routes, mileage, and calories burned. - Modes for walking, running, cycling, and climbing. ️ Compact and Stylish: - Slim design (9.6mm) with a comfy removable strap. - Available in Black, Pink, Purple, or Blue. - Lightweight at just 36g with durable PS+APS materials. - Customizable screen to suit your style. Vibrant Colors, Clear Display: - Big 1.85-inch IPS color screen in a sleek 43*37*11mm package. - It's not just a watch—it's your fun time buddy. ☔ Splashproof and Ready for Life: - IP67 waterproof protection against rain or splashes. ‍⚕️ Health Watchdog: - Monitor your Blood-Oxygen Saturation (SpO2) levels for a peek into your wellness. Welcome to Vibrant Living Store!

For a limited time only, click FOLLOW us to enjoy free gift with your purchase!

Don't miss out—claim yours today!

Imagine having a personal assistant on your wrist, guiding you toward better wellness every step of the way.

⌚The latest Y9 Pro smartwatch do more than just tell time—they empower you to live vibrantly.

✅ Discover these cool features:

1. Stay Healthy:

- Track heart rate, blood pressure, oxygen levels, and sleep.

- Monitor your menstrual cycle for women's health.

- Continuous 24-hour heart rate monitoring with alerts for abnormal spikes.

- Blood-oxygen saturation measurement for insights into your health.

2. Smart Reminders:

- Alerts for inactivity, calls, and messages from apps like Facebook, Twitter, Line, Skype, WhatsApp, SMS, WeChat, and QQ.

3. Call Functionality:

- Control ringtones, play music, access frequently used contacts.

- Loudspeaker for clear audio.

- Voice dialing, call initiation, emergency SOS calls, and call management (answer/reject).

4. Exercise Tracking:

- Count steps, record exercise duration, track running routes, mileage, and calories burned.

- Modes for walking, running, cycling, and climbing.

️ Compact and Stylish:

- Slim design (9.6mm) with a comfy removable strap.

- Available in Black, Pink, Purple, or Blue.

- Lightweight at just 36g with durable PS+APS materials.

- Customizable screen to suit your style.

Vibrant Colors, Clear Display:

- Big 1.85-inch IPS color screen in a sleek 43*37*11mm package.

- It's not just a watch—it's your fun time buddy.

☔ Splashproof and Ready for Life:

- IP67 waterproof protection against rain or splashes.

‍⚕️ Health Watchdog:

- Monitor your Blood-Oxygen Saturation (SpO2) levels for a peek into your wellness.

Tech Specs:

- Stay connected with Bluetooth 5.0 and the H Band app.

- Long-lasting battery for up to 14 days of basic use.

- Supports multiple languages: Chinese, English, German, Spanish, French, Italian, Portuguese, and Russian.

What's Inside:

- 1* Smart Watch (with a rad strap)

- 1* Charging Cable

- 1* User Manual

⏰ Don't wait!

With features that monitor your heart rate, track your fitness goals, and keep you connected, there's never been a better time to invest in your well-being.

What's more, the Y9 Pro smartwatch guarantees unmatched quality.

We offer a 1-to-1 warranty exchange for manufacturing defects within 14 days of purchase*.

*T&C: Color subject to availability.

Enjoy worry-free use.

Your health, lifestyle, and wellness deserve the best.

Get one for yourself and your loved ones now and experience the difference Y9 Pro smartwatch can make!

RESTING : Wear FB Inspire HR all day and night to record your resting and track over time. CARDIO FITNESS LEVEL: Use Inspire HR with your Fitbit app to get your Cardio Fitness Score—a snapshot of how fit you are—plus tips to improve. SLEEP STAGES: Inspire HR and your app show you how much light, deep and REM sleep you get and provide pointers that can help improve sleep quality. ALL-DAY ACTIVITY: Every part of your day impacts your goals, so FB Inspire HR tracks all-day steps, distance, active minutes and calories burned. Plus, it automatically tracks how long you’re swimming. UP TO 4 DAYS OF BATTERY: With a battery life up to 4 days, FB Inspire HR keeps the inspiration coming day and night. Varies with use and other factors. GUIDED BREATHING SESSIONS: FB Inspire H helps you find moments of calm throughout your day with personalized guided breathing sessions based on your . NOTIFICATIONS: Stay connected on the go with updates from social media apps and call, calendar and text alerts. Available on-device when your phone is nearby. INTUITIVE TOUCHSCREEN DISPLAY: The Inspire HR touchscreen has a backlit OLED display and responds to natural swiping and scrolling. FEMALE HEALTH TRACKING: Understand your body on a deeper level by using your tracker with the Fitbit app to follow your cycle, record symptoms and more. WIRELESS SYNC: FB Inspire H automatically connects to 200+ Android, iOS and Windows 10 devices to give you a cohesive view of your progress dashboard. FASHION FORWARD: FB Inspire HR is lightweight with comfortable silicone and stylish with a sleek appearance that blends seamlessly with the jewelry you already love to wear."}]

FB InspireHR is a friendly & fitness tracker for every day that helps you build healthy habits. This encouraging companion motivates you to reach your weight and fitness goals and even enjoy the journey with 24/7 , workout features, calorie burn tracking, goal celebrations, sleep stages and up to 5 days of battery life.

· 24/7 : 24/7 helps you maximize your exercise sessions, see zones, see sleep stages and better track calorie burn.

· RESTING : WearFB InspireHR all day and night to record your resting and track over time.

· LEVEL CARDIO FITNESS: Use Inspire HR with yourFB app to get your Cardio Fitness Score—a snapshot of how fit you are—plus tips to improve.

· SLEEP STAGES: InspireHR and your app show you how much light, deep and REM sleep you get and provide pointers that can help improve sleep quality.

· ALL-DAY ACTIVITY: Every part of your day impacts your goals, soFB InspireHR tracks all-day steps, distance, active minutes and calories burned.

· AUTOMATIC EXERCISE RECOGNITION: InspireHR uses SmartTrack to automatically recognize workouts like walks, runs, swims, bike rides and more, then records them for you in theFB app.

· SWIMPROOF SWIM TRACKING: Swimproof, so you can wear Inspire HR in the shower, pool and beyond. Plus, it automatically tracks how long you’re swimming.

· UP TO4 DAYS OF BATTERY: With a battery life up to4 days,FB InspireHR keeps the inspiration coming day and night. Varies with use and other factors.

· GUIDED BREATHING SESSIONS:FB Inspire HR helps you find moments of calm throughout your day with personalized guided breathing sessions based on your .

· NOTIFICATIONS: Stay connected on the go with updates from social media apps and call, calendar and text alerts. Available on-device when your phone is nearby.

Health Monitoring



This smartwatch offers comprehensive health monitoring features, including heart rate and sleep tracking, making it ideal for fitness enthusiasts and students.






Bluetooth Connectivity



Equipped with Bluetooth technology, this watch allows for seamless connectivity with your smartphone, enabling you to receive notifications and make calls hands-free.






Sports Mode



With its sports mode, this watch is perfect for runners and athletes, providing accurate data to help improve performance and track progress.






Unisex Design



Designed for both men and women, this versatile smartwatch is perfect for anyone looking for a stylish and functional timepiece.






Lightweight and Compact



Its lightweight and compact design makes it comfortable to wear all day, whether you're at school, work, or playing sports.
